fields.body: You are a helpful educational assistant. Summarize the following course content in a clear, concise way. Use bullet points for key concepts and keep the summary under 300 words.

fields.description: Flashcards profile for demo course. Generates flashcards from unit content.
Box chat profile with a custom prompt asking for a summary. Uses DirectLLMResponse with streaming.
Chat with function calling. Includes tools like get_context and get_location_content. Custom UI texts.
Streaming chat profile. Custom prompt and UI texts. Uses ThreadedLLMResponse orchestrator.
Educator assistant for Studio (CMS). Generates quiz questions from unit content. Custom UI texts. No location filter.
Mocked streaming profile for UI testing without a real LLM call. No API key needed.
